title: EdTech Learning Path Recommender
summary: Recommend next-best lessons from learner history, pace, and mastery signals.
knowledge_base: EdTech Learning Path Recommender is positioned as a EdTech starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Recommend next-best lessons from learner history, pace, and mastery signals.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on edtech, recommendation, students.
